summary: Iteration 25: Complete testing of new Participant Dashboard hub with all 7 widgets. ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (14/14). ALL FRONTEND FEATURES VERIFIED.
passed_tests: Participant login works (pierre@test.com / test1234)
Participant dashboard hub displays all 7 widgets
Hub stats bar shows Inscriptions, À venir, Terminées, Cette année counts
Mon Profil: GET /api/participant/profile returns profile
Mon Profil: PUT /api/participant/profile updates profile successfully
Mon Profil: View mode shows Téléphone, Date de naissance, Genre, Ville, Club, PPS
Mon Profil: Edit mode shows all editable fields with form inputs
Mon Profil: Save profile button updates and shows success toast
Mes Inscriptions: Lists all registrations (empty state shown correctly)
Mes Inscriptions: Mes Factures section shows invoices (3 invoices with amounts)
Courses à venir: GET /api/participant/upcoming returns future events
Courses à venir: Empty state with 'Explorer les événements' button
Mes Résultats: GET /api/participant/results returns past events
Mes Résultats: Empty state shown correctly
Bilan Sportif: GET /api/participant/stats returns annual statistics
Bilan Sportif: Stats cards display year, km, elevation, total inscriptions
Bilan Sportif: Monthly bar chart renders correctly
Bilan Sportif: Sports breakdown pie chart renders (or 'Pas encore de données')
Bilan Sportif: Financial summary shows inscriptions, boutique, total dépensé
Mes Commandes Boutique: GET /api/participant/orders returns 4 orders
Mes Commandes Boutique: Order cards show order_id, status, delivery method, items, prices
Messagerie: GET /api/participant/providers returns providers list
Messagerie: Shows 'SportWear Lyon' provider in sidebar
Messagerie: Chat opens when provider is clicked
Messagerie: POST /api/provider/messages sends message successfully
Messagerie: GET /api/provider/messages/{id} retrieves conversation
Messagerie: Messages display with timestamps
Back to hub button ('Retour au tableau de bord') works from every section
Header Home icon button returns to hub
Explorer les événements button in header navigates to /events
Authentication required for all participant endpoints (401/403 without token)
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed messages created during messaging tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25: Participant Dashboard with 7 hub widgets fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/participant/profile (profile CRUD), GET /api/participant/orders (shop orders with 4 existing orders), GET /api/participant/stats (annual stats for Bilan Sportif), GET /api/participant/upcoming (future events), GET /api/participant/results (past events), GET /api/participant/providers (providers for messaging). Participant has 4 shop orders and can message provider 'SportWear Lyon'. Provider orders query uses $or for provider_id and provider_ids array. SumUp payment integration remains MOCKED.
mocked_api_note: SumUp payment integration is MOCKED/simulated - orders are created with simulated payment status
